title: Modular Arithmetic
description: Modular arithmetic is clock-style math over a fixed modulus and is the base of Bitcoin signature calculations. It defines addition, subtraction, and multiplication inside finite fields.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin: Keys and Addresses
resources.notes: Introduces modular arithmetic in the context of Bitcoin keys and signatures.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core Academy: Script
resources.notes: Shows arithmetic and numeric constraints in Bitcoin Script execution.

resources.title: Bitcoin Dev Network: A Primer for Libbitcoin
resources.notes: Practical engineering context that links math primitives to implementation details.
